subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond the comprehension of creation, befitteth the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court of the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک خلق بساط امنع اقدس حضرت حق را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for children and youth, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
